name: api-testing-postman
description: Automated API Testing using Postman and Newman for Restful-Booker

scripts.test:booking: newman run collections/Restful-Booker.postman_collection.json -e environments/dev.postman_environment.json -r cli,json,htmlextra --reporter-json-export reports/newman-result.json --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/newman-report.html
scripts.test:all: npm run test:auth && npm run test:booking
